title: Create: Metallurgy
description: Create Metallurgy is a Create Mod Addon adding new metallurgy processes.
body:
# Create Metallurgy
_This update consists of two parts in order to gather as much feedback as possible to improve Ladle's features in the next part. So feel free to write your suggestions on Github!_ Create Metallurgy is a Create Mod Addon developped by Luc_Creeper74, introducing new way of refining ores or create alloys by melting them using a new raw ore processing system which can duplicate your ores up to x2.33 *(removed for now)*. Enough to make your factory stylish! **Supported Versions: See the [wiki page](https://github.com/Lucreeper74/Create-Metallurgy/wiki#supported-gamecreate-version)** **_(No Fabric Port planned)_** # About **⚠️ IMPORTANT ⚠️ :** In order to see all recipes and mechanics of this mod, please install [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei). ``` Note 🐜: This is under developpement, expect to encounter several bugs. Before updating this mod, make backups of your worlds. ``` ### Current Content: - Foundry Basin - Foundry Mixer - Foundry Top - Glassed Alloyer Top - Casting Table - Casting Basin - Light Bulb - Wolframite / Tungsten ### Planned Content: - More Advanced Ores Processing - Others Languages Translation - Configuration File ``` 💡 Feel free to share your ideas in Forum section of the Discord ! ``` # Links # Credits ### **Developers** Luc_Creeper74 ### **Contributors** MrGhastien ### **Artists** - [**lev**](https://modrinth.com/user/lev) -> Logo - **FracturedGradient** -> Some Items Textures - [**Janko**](https://modrinth.com/user/janko1902) -> Industrial Crucible textures ### **Translation** - Zavdfer / Priklen -> Russian localization - Tellurium -> Chinese localization - Albertosaurio65 -> Spanish localization - TinxLD -> German localization - restingphantom131 -> Dutch localization - [**Janko**](https://modrinth.com/user/janko1902) -> Croatian localization - CrazyBarkley -> Polish localization
